results.title: Quadrature rule optimization
results.summary: A compact one-dimensional quadrature rule improved against a frozen analytic test suite. The public result separates the acceptance score from the interpretable numerical errors so the gain can be inspected, replayed, and challenged.

website.card_summary: Candidate quadrature rules are evaluated against analytic integrands and retained only when the measured objective improves.

figure_captions.assets/objective-curve.svg: Best-so-far objective over the curated public trace. The acceptance score is lower-is-better and should be read as the contract used to retain candidates.
figure_captions.assets/candidate-trace.svg: Accepted quadrature rule: node positions, normalized weights, and residual error by representative integrand.

website.score_note: The objective is the evaluation contract used by the run, not a universal measure of integration quality. The scientific interpretation comes from reading it together with the residual errors and the replayable candidate.

results.title: Storage arbitrage policy
results.summary: A battery dispatch policy evolved against frozen OMIE day-ahead prices, showing objective improvement while preserving auditable operating behavior.

website.card_summary: A battery dispatch policy is evaluated across fixed price scenarios and retained only when the governed objective improves.
